ucs.title: [LLM] Silk Typhoon (HAFNIUM) Exchange webshell: w3wp.exe spawning cmd/PowerShell/recon LOLBins
ucs.description: Hunts the signature post-exploit chain seen in HAFNIUM/Silk Typhoon's ProxyLogon (CVE-2021-26855/26857/26858/27065) and subsequent Exchange/IIS zero-day campaigns: a China Chopper-style .aspx webshell dropped under the Exchange or IIS web root causes w3wp.exe (the IIS worker, running as IIS APPPOOL or NetworkService) to spawn cmd.exe, powershell.exe, or AD-recon/credential-dump LOLBins. This parent/child shape is highly atypical for healthy Exchange and is the canonical Silk Typhoon post-exploit fingerprint.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdlines values(Processes.process_id) as pids from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name="w3wp.exe" AND Processes.process_name IN ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","powershell_ise.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","whoami.exe","systeminfo.exe","tasklist.exe","nltest.exe","arp.exe","quser.exe","query.exe","reg.exe","schtasks.exe","sc.exe","wmic.exe","cscript.exe","wscript.exe","rundll32.exe","certutil.exe","bitsadmin.exe","procdump.exe","procdump64.exe","vssadmin.exe","ntdsutil.exe","7z.exe","makecab.exe") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process Processes.parent_process_id Processes.process_name Processes.process | `drop_dm_object_name("Processes")` | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime) | sort - lastTime
ucs.kql:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "w3wp.exe"
| where FileName in~ (
    "cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","powershell_ise.exe",
    "net.exe","net1.exe","whoami.exe","systeminfo.exe","tasklist.exe",
    "nltest.exe","arp.exe","quser.exe","query.exe","reg.exe",
    "schtasks.exe","sc.exe","wmic.exe","cscript.exe","wscript.exe",
    "rundll32.exe","certutil.exe","bitsadmin.exe",
    "procdump.exe","procdump64.exe","vssadmin.exe","ntdsutil.exe",
    "7z.exe","makecab.exe")
// HAFNIUM-style recon / dump / archival commandline tells
| extend SuspectCmd = case(
    ProcessCommandLine has_any ("net group","net localgroup","net user /domain","nltest /dclist","nltest /domain_trusts"), "DomainRecon",
    ProcessCommandLine has_any ("lsass","comsvcs.dll","MiniDump","ntdsutil","vssadmin create shadow"), "CredDump",
    ProcessCommandLine has_any ("-EncodedCommand","-enc ","DownloadString","IEX(","Invoke-Expression"), "PSEvasion",
    ProcessCommandLine has_any ("7z a ","makecab ","WinRAR",".7z ",".rar "), "StagedArchive",
    "GenericLOLBin")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, AccountDomain,
          ParentPath = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
          ParentCmd  = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          ChildName  = FileName,
          ChildPath  = FolderPath,
          ChildCmd   = ProcessCommandLine,
          SuspectCmd, SHA256
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where ParentProcessName endswith "\\w3wp.exe"
| where NewProcessName has_any (
    "\\cmd.exe","\\powershell.exe","\\pwsh.exe","\\powershell_ise.exe",
    "\\net.exe","\\net1.exe","\\whoami.exe","\\systeminfo.exe","\\tasklist.exe",
    "\\nltest.exe","\\reg.exe","\\schtasks.exe","\\sc.exe","\\wmic.exe",
    "\\cscript.exe","\\wscript.exe","\\rundll32.exe","\\certutil.exe",
    "\\bitsadmin.exe","\\procdump.exe","\\procdump64.exe",
    "\\vssadmin.exe","\\ntdsutil.exe","\\7z.exe","\\makecab.exe")
| extend SuspectCmd = case(
    CommandLine has_any ("net group","net localgroup","nltest /dclist","nltest /domain_trusts"), "DomainRecon",
    CommandLine has_any ("lsass","comsvcs.dll","MiniDump","ntdsutil","vssadmin create shadow"), "CredDump",
    CommandLine has_any ("-EncodedCommand","-enc ","DownloadString","IEX(","Invoke-Expression"), "PSEvasion",
    CommandLine has_any ("7z a ","makecab ","WinRAR",".7z ",".rar "), "StagedArchive",
    "GenericLOLBin")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, SubjectUserName,
          ParentProcessName, NewProcessName, CommandLine, SuspectCmd, TokenElevationType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Silk Typhoon (HAFNIUM) Exchange Webshell — w3wp.exe spawning LOLBin/Recon child
id: 8c2c7b5e-1d2c-4a1a-9b9c-silk-typhoon-w3wp
status: experimental
description: |
  Detects HAFNIUM/Silk Typhoon (G0125) post-exploit activity where a China
  Chopper-style .aspx webshell on a compromised Microsoft Exchange / IIS
  server causes w3wp.exe to spawn cmd, PowerShell, AD-recon, credential-dump
  or archival LOLBins. Pattern observed in ProxyLogon and follow-on Exchange
  zero-day campaigns attributed to Silk Typhoon by MSTIC.
references:
  - https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2021/03/02/hafnium-targeting-exchange-servers/
  - https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2025/03/05/silk-typhoon-targeting-it-supply-chain/
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0125/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2024/01/15
tags:
  - attack.initial_access
  - attack.execution
  - attack.persistence
  - attack.t1190
  - attack.t1505.003
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.t1059.003
  - attack.g0125
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  parent_iis:
    ParentImage|endswith: '\w3wp.exe'
  child_lolbin:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\net.exe'
      - '\net1.exe'
      - '\whoami.exe'
      - '\systeminfo.exe'
      - '\tasklist.exe'
      - '\nltest.exe'
      - '\reg.exe'
      - '\schtasks.exe'
      - '\sc.exe'
      - '\wmic.exe'
      - '\cscript.exe'
      - '\wscript.exe'
      - '\rundll32.exe'
      - '\certutil.exe'
      - '\bitsadmin.exe'
      - '\procdump.exe'
      - '\procdump64.exe'
      - '\vssadmin.exe'
      - '\ntdsutil.exe'
      - '\7z.exe'
      - '\makecab.exe'
  condition: parent_iis and child_lolbin
falsepositives:
  - Microsoft Exchange Health Manager scripts (rare; whitelist by signed PS module path)
  - Vendor monitoring agents that shell out from w3wp (uncommon)
level: high
ucs.rationale: Specific to Silk Typhoon/HAFNIUM (G0125): they are the actor most strongly associated with industrial-scale Exchange exploitation (ProxyLogon and follow-on chains). Their canonical post-exploit signature is the China Chopper webshell under the Exchange/OWA/ECP path causing w3wp.exe — which in healthy Exchange almost never shells out — to spawn cmd, PowerShell, AD-recon (nltest/net), credential dum
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID

ucs.title: [LLM] Silk Typhoon supply-chain pivot: Service Principal credential add followed by Graph access from new IP
ucs.description: Hunts Silk Typhoon's 2024-2025 IT-supply-chain tradecraft (MSTIC, March 2025) where the actor steals Entra ID application secrets / API keys from compromised MSPs, IdPs and PAM systems, then uses the stolen service-principal credentials to access downstream customer tenants via Microsoft Graph. The detection chains an audit-log credential-add against an Entra app/SP with a successful service principal sign-in to Graph from an IP never seen for that SP in the 30-day baseline.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true min(_time) as cred_add_time from datamodel=Change where Change.action=created Change.object_category="service_principal_credential" OR (Change.change_type="AAD" AND (Change.command="Add service principal credentials." OR Change.command="Update application – Certificates and secrets management")) by Change.object Change.object_id Change.user Change.src | `drop_dm_object_name("Change")` | rename object_id as sp_id user as initiator src as initiator_ip | join type=inner sp_id [ | tstats summariesonly=true min(_time) as first_graph_signin count from datamodel=Authentication where Authentication.signature="ServicePrincipalSignIn" AND Authentication.dest="graph.microsoft.com" AND Authentication.action=success by Authentication.user Authentication.user_id Authentication.src | `drop_dm_object_name("Authentication")` | rename user_id as sp_id src as graph_src_ip ] | where first_graph_signin >= cred_add_time AND first_graph_signin <= cred_add_time + 14400 | table cred_add_time first_graph_signin sp_id object initiator initiator_ip graph_src_ip count
ucs.kql:
// New SP/app credential added in CloudAppEvents (Office 365 / Entra audit feed)
let CredAdds = CloudAppEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where ActionType in~ (
        "Add service principal credentials.",
        "Update application \u2013 Certificates and secrets management",
        "Update application",
        "Add application.",
        "Update service principal")
    | extend Target = parse_json(tostring(RawEventData)).Target
    | mv-apply T = Target on (
        where tostring(T.Type) in ("2","App","ServicePrincipal")
        | project SPDisplayName = tostring(T.ID))
    | project CredAddTime = Timestamp, SPDisplayName,
              Initiator = AccountDisplayName, InitiatorIP = IPAddress,
              InitiatorCountry = CountryCode;
// Recent Graph activity by service principals (CloudAppEvents AccountType==Application)
let GraphActivity = CloudAppEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where AccountType =~ "Application"
    | where Application has_any ("Microsoft Graph","Office 365 Exchange Online","SharePoint","OneDrive")
    | project GraphTime = Timestamp, SPDisplayName = AccountDisplayName,
              GraphIP = IPAddress, GraphCountry = CountryCode,
              Application, ActivityType = ActionType;
CredAdds
| join kind=inner GraphActivity on SPDisplayName
| where GraphTime between (CredAddTime .. CredAddTime + 4h)
| where InitiatorIP != GraphIP
   or (isnotempty(GraphCountry) and GraphCountry != InitiatorCountry)
| summarize FirstGraphTime = min(GraphTime),
            GraphIPs = make_set(GraphIP, 10),
            GraphCountries = make_set(GraphCountry, 10),
            Apps = make_set(Application, 10),
            Activities = make_set(ActivityType, 10)
            by SPDisplayName, CredAddTime, Initiator, InitiatorIP, InitiatorCountry
| order by FirstGraphTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let BaselineDays = 30d;
let RecentHours = 24h;
// 1. New SP/app credential adds from Entra audit logs
let CredAdds = AuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(RecentHours)
    | where OperationName in~ (
        "Add service principal credentials.",
        "Update application – Certificates and secrets management",
        "Update application",
        "Add application.",
        "Update service principal")
    | where Result == "success"
    | extend Initiator = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).user.userPrincipalName),
             InitiatorIP = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).user.ipAddress)
    | mv-expand TR = TargetResources
    | extend SPId = tostring(TR.id),
             SPName = tostring(TR.displayName),
             SPType = tostring(TR.type)
    | where SPType in~ ("ServicePrincipal","Application")
    | project CredAddTime = TimeGenerated, SPId, SPName, Initiator, InitiatorIP, OperationName;
// 2. Per-SP IP baseline (last 30d, excluding the recent window)
let SPIpBaseline = AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
    | where TimeGenerated between (ago(BaselineDays) .. ago(RecentHours))
    | where ResultType == 0
    | summarize by ServicePrincipalId, IPAddress;
// 3. Recent Graph sign-ins by those SPs from a NEW IP
let AnomalousGraph = AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(RecentHours)
    | where ResultType == 0
    | where ResourceDisplayName in~ ("Microsoft Graph","Office 365 Exchange Online","Office 365 SharePoint Online")
    | join kind=leftanti SPIpBaseline on ServicePrincipalId, IPAddress
    | summarize FirstGraphTime = min(TimeGenerated), Calls = count(),
                Resources = make_set(ResourceDisplayName),
                Locations = make_set(strcat(tostring(parse_json(tostring(LocationDetails)).countryOrRegion),
                                            "/", tostring(parse_json(tostring(LocationDetails)).city)))
                by ServicePrincipalId, ServicePrincipalName, IPAddress;
CredAdds
| join kind=inner AnomalousGraph on $left.SPId == $right.ServicePrincipalId
| where FirstGraphTime between (CredAddTime .. CredAddTime + 6h)
| project CredAddTime, FirstGraphTime,
          MinutesToAbuse = datetime_diff('minute', FirstGraphTime, CredAddTime),
          SPName, SPId, OperationName,
          Initiator, InitiatorIP,
          AbuseIP = IPAddress, AbuseLocations = Locations,
          AbuseResources = Resources, GraphCalls = Calls
| order by FirstGraphTime desc
ucs.rationale: MSTIC's March 2025 Silk Typhoon report explicitly calls out this exact tradecraft: stealing API keys / Entra app secrets from IT supply-chain victims (MSPs, IdPs, PAM vendors), adding new credentials to compromised service principals, and pivoting into downstream customer tenants via Graph for mass mailbox/file collection. The detection is actor-specific because it pairs the credential-add → SP Gr

_sentinel_field_issues.message: `LocationDetails` is not a column of AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs, AuditLogs; it does exist on SigninLogs.
